ddls:
CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "album_length" INTEGER /* Length of the album in seconds */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label that released the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who produced the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the album belongs to */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date when the album was recorded */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "record_label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_record_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_label_id") REFERENCES record_labels ("record_label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's image */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the artist */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the artist (if applicable) */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the artist (city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the label */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_labels" (
  "record_label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record label */,
  "record_label_name" TEXT /* Name of the record label */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the record label */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the record label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_genres" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_reviews_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, moderator, subscriber) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "public" INTEGER /* Whether the playlist is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_albums" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_followers" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_user_recommendations" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recommended the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_user_recommendations" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recommended the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_friendships" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the friend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "friend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_playlist_shares" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the playlist */,
  "shared_with_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with whom the playlist was shared */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shared playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "shared_with_id", "playlist_id")
)
